messages.content: Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, ‘Two women are smiling and cooking in a kitchen filled with a counter full of vegetables, potatoes and meat, one is holding a spoon of green beans.’.

1) Subject: Two women | Relation: are | Object: smiling and cooking in a kitchen
2) Subject: kitchen | Relation: is filled with | Object: a counter full of vegetables, potatoes, and meat
3) Subject: one | Relation: is holding | Object: a spoon of green beans

Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, ‘Two women are smiling and cooking in a kitchen filled with a counter full of vegetables, potatoes and meat, one is holding a spoon of green beans.’.

1) Subject: Two women | Relation: are | Object: smiling and cooking in a kitchen
2) Subject: kitchen | Relation: is filled with | Object: a counter full of vegetables, potatoes, and meat
3) Subject: one | Relation: is holding | Object: a spoon of green beans

Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'Three woman that each have a bag are smiling as they stand next to a red hose, in front of several wooden casks that are stacked on wooden racks.'.

2) Subject: Three women | Relation: are | Object: smiling
3) Subject: Three women | Relation: stand next to | Object: a red hose
4) Subject: wooden casks | Relation: are stacked on | Object: wooden racks

Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'A dog stands on the back of a striped couch as a person lays on the couch with a lap top computer and another dog lays his head near the person.'.
